calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HANSON CRAWFORD CRUM FAMILY LAW GROUP LLP, BELINDA HANSON's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendants' demurrer to the first amended complaint's (FAC) third cause of action for unfair business practices is sustained with leave to amend. "A plaintiff alleging unfair business practices" under Business and Professions Code 17200 et seq. "must state with reasonable particularity the facts supporting the statutory elements of the violation." (Khoury v. Maly's of California, Inc. (1999) 14 Cal.App.4th 612, 619.) The FAC does not adequately address the statutory elements.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR No. 9711, Email: lreding@sftc.org. =(302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Jul-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
